name: userconfig-probe
description: Diagnostic probe that logs every initialize param + notification Claude Desktop sends. Used to determine which channel delivers user_config at runtime.

tools.name: probe_dump
tools.description: Confirms the probe is reachable and returns the log path.

probeStringValue.title: Probe String Value
probeStringValue.description: If you can read this in the probe log, the user_config string channel works.

probeAllowedDirectories.title: Probe Allowed Directories
probeAllowedDirectories.description: Directory-list variant — what excel uses for allowedDirectories.
